subject: chore(deps): minor/patch bumps; fix react-hooks 7.1.1 lint regressions
body:
deps trigger pass — scoped to safe updates within existing semver ranges:

- dompurify 3.3.3 → 3.4.0 (minor, ^3.3.3 range)
- eslint-plugin-react-hooks 7.0.1 → 7.1.1 (minor, ^7.0.1)
- marked 17.0.1 → 17.0.6 (patch, ^17.0.1)

No package.json edits — lockfile refresh only.

The react-hooks plugin 7.1.1 ships a stricter `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect`
rule and a new `react-hooks/refs` rule, which surfaced four latent issues:

- SampleImagesSection.jsx:24: Ref was being mutated during render
  (`selectedCellRef.current = selectedCell`). Moved to a no-deps useEffect
  that runs after each committed render — concurrent-mode safe (a
  discarded render can no longer desync the ref).
- App.jsx:218 (cell-clamp), App.jsx:254 (mobile→desktop cleanup),
  SampleImagesSection.jsx:63 (fetch-on-mount): Legitimate setState-in-effect
  patterns already suppressed elsewhere in the codebase with the same
  rationale (external-sync, derived persistence, async bootstrapping).
  Added `eslint-disable-next-line ... -- <reason>` suffixes on the exact
  setState call lines (suppressions on the useEffect line don't cover
  deeper calls in 7.1.1).

NOT updating (require user call):
- Major bumps (eslint 9→10 blocked by plugin peer cap, react 18→19,
  vite 5→8, @vitejs/plugin-react 4→6, globals 15→17, marked 17→18).
- 13 audit advisories in build-toolchain (vite-plugin-pwa → workbox-build
  → rollup/picomatch/serialize-javascript). `npm audit fix --force`
  regresses vite-plugin-pwa 1.2.0 → 0.19.8, no upstream patch available.
  All dev-only, never runs at user runtime.

No unused runtime deps — verified dompurify, file-saver, html-to-image,
jszip, marked, pdf-lib, sharp all referenced.

Tags: deps, lint, react-hooks, tidy
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: clean-sweep-2026-04
Semver: patch
